name: Synthetic Monitoring Dashboard
description: Dashboard for synthetic monitoring metrics and alerts

nrql.query:
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE result = 
\SUCCESS') FROM SyntheticCheck TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT average(duration) FROM SyntheticCheck FACET location SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT timestamp, checkType, location, errorType FROM SyntheticCheck WHERE result = \FAILED' SINCE 6 hours ago ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT count(*) FROM SyntheticCheck FACET checkType, result SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM SyntheticCheck WHERE result = \FAILED' FACET errorType SINCE 24 hours ago
